_comment: Species: Spirit Deer (灵鹿) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Deer

canonical.appearance: Graceful deer 1.5 m, fur spirit-brown, antlers of crystal, eyes gentle
canonical.size: 1.5 m adult, 100 jin; ancient 3 m, 1000 jin
canonical.behavior: Herbivore; cultivates by absorbing dawn-dew; auspicious to encounter
canonical.habitat: Spirit herb hills, dawn-aspected forests, auspicious valleys
canonical.relationships: Prey for wind wolves, mountain lions; auspicious
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_deer — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
